hero.badge: Sake Amfani da Abun ciki ta AI
hero.title: Juya Bidiyo Guda Zuwa
hero.subtitle: Manna hanyar YouTube. Saka podcast. Saka rubutun magana.
hero.accent: ailomo nan take yana ƙirƙirar abun ciki mai kyau ga kowane dandali.
hero.placeholder: Manna hanyar YouTube, URL na podcast, ko kowane bidiyo...
hero.fileDropSubtitle: MP3, WAV, MP4, MOV — har zuwa 500MB
hero.textPlaceholder: Manna rubutunka ko rubutu — AI yana canza shi zuwa abun ciki mai shirye don dandali...
hero.noSignup: Babu buƙatar rajista. Kyauta don farawa.

steps.title: Manna ko Saka
steps.desc: Saka hanyar YouTube, saka fayil ɗin sauti, ko manna rubutu. Babu saitin komai.

steps.title: AI Ya Canza Shi
steps.desc: Ana rubuta abun cikinka, fahimta, kuma sake rubutawa don muryar kowane dandali.

steps.title: Buga Ko'ina
steps.desc: Sami rubutun blog, jerin sako na jama'a, wasiƙun labarai, da ƙari. Kwafa, saukewa, an gama.

items.title: Ba Rubutu Kawai Ba
items.desc: AI ɗinmu yana nazarin mahallin, fitar da bayanai, da ƙirƙirar abun ciki da aka inganta don masu sauraron kowane dandali.

items.title: Danna Guda, Kowane Dandali
items.desc: Duk tsare-tsare 10 ana ƙirƙira su lokaci guda. Daga rubutun blog mai tsawo zuwa jerin sako na jama'a — komai yana shirye cikin daƙiƙai.

items.title: Yi Hira da Abun Cikinka
items.desc: Kowane sakamako yana da hira ta AI. 'Ƙara ƙarin bayanai', 'yi shi mai ƙarfi' — ana amfani da canje-canje nan take.

features.label: Fasaloli
features.title: Komai Don
features.subtitle: An gina shi don masu ƙirƙira waɗanda ke juya kowane ɓangaren abun ciki zuwa tasiri mafi girma.

list.title: Sake Rubutu ta AI
list.desc: Ba rubutu kawai ba — AI ɗinmu yana fahimtar mahallin kuma ya sake rubutawa don muryar kowane dandali.

list.title: Tsare-tsare 10 na Sakamako
list.desc: Rubutun blog, jerin sako na Twitter, LinkedIn, Xiaohongshu, wasiƙun labarai, SRT subtitles, labaran SEO, da ƙari.

list.title: Harsuna 63+
list.desc: Rubuta da ƙirƙira abun ciki cikin harsuna 63+. An gina shi don masu ƙirƙira na duniya.

list.title: Ƙirƙira ta Streaming
list.desc: Abun ciki yana bayyana harafi da harafi a ainihin lokaci. Babu jiran spinners.

list.title: Gyara ta Hira
list.desc: Yi hira da kowane sakamako don daidaita shi. 'Yi shi gajarta' — an gama.

list.title: Tsare-tsare 6 na Fitarwa
list.desc: Markdown, TXT, PDF, DOCX, SRT, CSV. Shirye don bugawa nan take.

list.title: Raba & Haɗa Kai
list.desc: Ƙirƙira hanyoyi don abokan aiki don duba da haɗa kai akan abun cikinka.

list.title: Sirri & Amintacce
list.desc: Ana share fayiloli bayan aiki. Ba a taɓa amfani da abun cikinka don horarwa ba.

list.title: Gano Mai Hankali
list.desc: Hanyar YouTube? → Blog + Twitter. Bilibili? → WeChat + Xiaohongshu. Ta atomatik.

formats.outputSubtitle: Ƙirƙira komai lokaci guda — babu buƙatar gudanar da kayan aiki sau da yawa.
formats.langSubtitle: Rubuta da ƙirƙira abun ciki cikin harsuna 63+. Daidai ga masu ƙirƙira na duniya da masu sauraro na duniya.

testimonials.text: "A ƙarshe kayan aiki da ya fahimci aikin ƙirƙirar abun ciki. Bidiyo guda → duk dandamali cikin mintuna. Canji ga jadawalin abun ciki na."
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.text: "Gyaran hira yana da hazaka. Zan iya daidaita kowane sakamako ta hira da shi. Yana ceton ni sa'o'i kowane mako."
testimonials.author: Marcus Rivera

testimonials.text: "Na yi shakka game da abun ciki na AI, amma ingancin ya ba ni mamaki da gaske. Tsarin dandali na musamman yana daidai."
testimonials.author: Yuki Tanaka

testimonials.text: "A matsayina na wanda ya kafa kamfani ni kaɗai, wannan kayan aiki yana ba ni sakamakon ƙungiyar abun ciki. LinkedIn posts, blogs, tweets — duk daga bidiyo guda."
testimonials.author: Alex Park

pricing.label: Farashi
pricing.title: Sauƙi,
pricing.subtitle: Fara kyauta, haɓaka lokacin da kake buƙatar ƙari. Babu kuɗaɗen ɓoye. Soke kowane lokaci.

creator.name: Mai Ƙirƙira
creator.desc: Don masu ƙirƙira abun ciki masu mahimmanci

pro.name: Pro
features: Samfurin AI na musamman + sautin musamman

cta.title: Shirye Don
cta.subtitle: Shiga dubban masu ƙirƙira waɗanda ke juya kowane bidiyo zuwa cikakkiyar dabarun abun ciki na dandali da yawa. Fara kyauta — babu buƙatar katin kuɗi.

items.q: Shin da gaske kyauta ne don farawa?
items.a: E! Shirin kyauta yana ba ku bidiyo 3/wata tare da tsare-tsare 5 na sakamako. Babu buƙatar katin kuɗi.
Harsuna 63+ don rubutu da ƙirƙirar abun ciki.

items.q: Wadanne dandamali zan iya sake amfani da abun ciki a kansu?
items.a: WeChat, Xiaohongshu, Twitter/X, LinkedIn, blogs, Medium, Substack, wasiƙun labarai, da ƙari.
Yawancin bidiyo ana aiwatar da su cikin ƙasa da minti 1. Abun ciki yana gudana a ainihin lokaci.

items.q: Zan iya gyara abun cikin da AI ya ƙirƙira?
items.a: E! Yi hira da kowane sakamako don daidaita sauti, tsayi, salo, ko ƙara abubuwa.

items.q: Wadanne tsare-tsaren fayil zan iya sakawa?
items.a: Sauti: MP3, WAV, M4A, FLAC, OGG. Bidiyo: MP4, MOV, MKV, WEBM.
E. Ana share fayiloli bayan aiki. Ba a taɓa amfani da su don horarwa ba.
E, soke kowane lokaci. Babu kwangiloli na dogon lokaci.

footer.tagline: Sake amfani da abun ciki ta AI. Juya bidiyo guda zuwa cikakkiyar dabarun abun ciki na dandali da yawa.
footer.builtWith: An gina shi don masu ƙirƙira abun ciki a duniya

workbench.refinePlaceholder: Faɗa wa AI yadda za a daidaita wannan abun ciki...
